title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 408.410 - Exempt transactions
text:
408.410.  Exempt transactions. — Sections 408.400 to 408.415 are not applicable to:
  (1)  An instrument or other writing which evidences a loan or indebtedness to a lender or person, other than a seller or lessor, which was not arranged by a seller or lessor, the proceeds of which are used by the buyer or lessee to satisfy an obligation to a seller or lessor;
  (2)  Credit card sales on a credit card issued by an issuer other than the seller.
(L. 1974 H.B. 1047, et al. § 3)
